data.name: grdThuaRuong.BuiltInTextsData
data.value: <LocalizableData ID="LocalizableStrings" Collection="true"><GroupByBoxInfo>Kéo tiêu đề vào đây để nhóm theo cộ</GroupByBoxInfo><EmptyGridInfo>Chưa có dữ liệu thửa ruộng</EmptyGridInfo></LocalizableData>

data.name: grdThuaRuong_DesignTimeLayout.LayoutString
data.value: <GridEXLayoutData><RootTable><AllowAddNew>False</AllowAddNew><Columns Collection="true" ElementName="Column"><Column0 ID="ID"><Caption>ID</Caption><DataMember>ID</DataMember><EditType>MultiColumnCombo</EditType><Key>ID</Key><Position>0</Position><Visible>False</Visible><Tag>0</Tag></Column0><Column1 ID="HopDongID"><Caption>HopDongID</Caption><DataMember>HopDongID</DataMember><Key>HopDongID</Key><Position>1</Position><Visible>False</Visible></Column1><Column2 ID="CBDB"><Caption>Cán bộ địa bàn</Caption><DataMember>CBDB</DataMember><Key>CBDB</Key><Position>2</Position><Width>144</Width></Column2><Column3 ID="XuDong"><CompareTarget>Text</CompareTarget><Caption>Xứ đồng</Caption><DataMember>XuDong</DataMember><Key>XuDong</Key><Position>3</Position><Width>124</Width><Tag>2</Tag><CellStyle><ForeColor>Black</ForeColor><Font>Microsoft Sans Serif, 9.75pt</Font></CellStyle></Column3><Column4 ID="TenBai"><CompareTarget>Text</CompareTarget><Caption>Bãi tập kết</Caption><DataMember>TenBai</DataMember><DefaultGroupInterval>Text</DefaultGroupInterval><Key>TenBai</Key><Position>4</Position><Width>128</Width></Column4><Column5 ID="DienTich"><AggregateFunction>Sum</AggregateFunction><Caption>DT (ha)</Caption><DataMember>DienTich</DataMember><FormatString>### ##0.00</FormatString><Key>DienTich</Key><MaxLength>10</MaxLength><Position>5</Position><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>68</Width><TotalFormatString>### ##0.00</TotalFormatString><Tag>5</Tag><CellStyle><ForeColor>Black</ForeColor><Font>Microsoft Sans Serif, 9.75pt</Font></CellStyle></Column5><Column6 ID="LoaiDat"><CompareTarget>Text</CompareTarget><Caption>Loại đất</Caption><DataMember>LoaiDat</DataMember><DefaultGroupInterval>Text</DefaultGroupInterval><Key>LoaiDat</Key><Position>6</Position><Width>119</Width><Tag>6</Tag><DefaultValue>1</DefaultValue><DefaultValueType>System.Int32</DefaultValueType><CellStyle><ForeColor>Black</ForeColor><Font>Microsoft Sans Serif, 9.75pt</Font></CellStyle></Column6><Column7 ID="KieuTrong"><CompareTarget>Text</CompareTarget><Caption>Gốc mía</Caption><DataMember>KieuTrong</DataMember><DefaultGroupInterval>Text</DefaultGroupInterval><Key>KieuTrong</Key><Position>7</Position><Width>95</Width><DefaultValue>2</DefaultValue><DefaultValueType>System.Int16</DefaultValueType></Column7><Column8 ID="GiongMia"><CompareTarget>Text</CompareTarget><Caption>Giống mía</Caption><DataMember>GiongMia</DataMember><DefaultGroupInterval>Text</DefaultGroupInterval><Key>GiongMia</Key><Position>8</Position><Width>121</Width><Tag>9</Tag><DefaultValue>2</DefaultValue><DefaultValueType>System.Int32</DefaultValueType><CellStyle><ForeColor>Black</ForeColor><Font>Microsoft Sans Serif, 9.75pt</Font></CellStyle></Column8><Column9 ID="RaiVu"><CompareTarget>Text</CompareTarget><Caption>Rải vụ</Caption><DataMember>RaiVu</DataMember><Key>RaiVu</Key><Position>9</Position><Width>99</Width><Tag>10</Tag><DefaultValue>1</DefaultValue><DefaultValueType>System.Int32</DefaultValueType><CellStyle><ForeColor>Black</ForeColor><Font>Microsoft Sans Serif, 9.75pt</Font></CellStyle></Column9><Column10 ID="NgayTrong"><Caption>Ngày trồng</Caption><DataMember>NgayTrong</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><FormatString>dd/MM/yyyy</FormatString><InputMask>00/00/0000</InputMask><Key>NgayTrong</Key><Position>10</Position><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>104</Width><Tag>13</Tag><CellStyle><ForeColor>Black</ForeColor><Font>Microsoft Sans Serif, 9.75pt</Font></CellStyle></Column10><Column11 ID="SanLuongDuKien"><AggregateFunction>Sum</AggregateFunction><Caption>SLDK (tấn)</Caption><DataMember>SanLuongDuKien</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><FormatString>### ### ##0.###</FormatString><Key>SanLuongDuKien</Key><Position>11</Position><Selectable>False</Selectable><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>86</Width><TotalFormatString>### ### ##0</TotalFormatString><Tag>15</Tag><CellStyle><ForeColor>Black</ForeColor><Font>Microsoft Sans Serif, 9.75pt</Font></CellStyle></Column11></Columns><AllowDelete>True</AllowDelete><AllowEdit>False</AllowEdit><ColumnHeaders>True</ColumnHeaders><ColumnSetHeaders>True</ColumnSetHeaders><GroupCondition /><RowHeaders>True</RowHeaders><RowHeight>25</RowHeight><RowFormatStyle><ForeColor>Black</ForeColor><BackColorGradient>Window</BackColorGradient><BackColorAlphaMode>Opaque</BackColorAlphaMode></RowFormatStyle><NewRowFormatStyle><BackColor>SkyBlue</BackColor></NewRowFormatStyle></RootTable></GridEXLayoutData>

data.name: grdHopDong_DesignTimeLayout.LayoutString
data.value: <GridEXLayoutData><RootTable><AllowAddNew>False</AllowAddNew><Columns Collection="true" ElementName="Column"><Column0 ID="ID"><Caption>ID</Caption><DataMember>ID</DataMember><Key>ID</Key><Position>0</Position><Visible>False</Visible></Column0><Column1 ID="btnmenu"><ButtonDisplayMode>Always</ButtonDisplayMode><AllowDrag>False</AllowDrag><AllowRemove>False</AllowRemove><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><AllowSort>False</AllowSort><ButtonText>...</ButtonText><ButtonStyle>ButtonCell</ButtonStyle><BoundMode>UnboundFetch</BoundMode><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><FilterEditType>NoEdit</FilterEditType><Key>btnmenu</Key><Position>1</Position><TextAlignment>Center</TextAlignment><Width>21</Width></Column1><Column2 ID="MaHopDong"><AggregateFunction>Count</AggregateFunction><Caption>Mã Chủ Hộ</Caption><DataMember>MaHopDong</DataMember><Key>MaHopDong</Key><Position>2</Position><Selectable>False</Selectable><Width>142</Width><TotalFormatString>### ##0</TotalFormatString></Column2><Column3 ID="HoTen"><Caption>Họ và Tên</Caption><DataMember>HoTen</DataMember><Key>HoTen</Key><Position>3</Position><Selectable>False</Selectable><Width>237</Width></Column3><Column4 ID="NgaySinh"><Caption>Ngày Sinh</Caption><DataMember>NgaySinh</DataMember><EditType>CalendarCombo</EditType><FormatString>dd/MM/yyyy</FormatString><InputMask>00/00/0000</InputMask><Key>NgaySinh</Key><Position>4</Position><Selectable>False</Selectable><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>124</Width></Column4><Column5 ID="SoCMT"><Caption>Số CMT</Caption><DataMember>SoCMT</DataMember><Key>SoCMT</Key><Position>5</Position><RightToLeft>Yes</RightToLeft><Selectable>False</Selectable><Width>138</Width></Column5><Column6 ID="NgayCap"><Caption>Ngày Cấp</Caption><DataMember>NgayCap</DataMember><EditType>CalendarCombo</EditType><FormatString>dd/MM/yyyy</FormatString><InputMask>00/00/0000</InputMask><Key>NgayCap</Key><Position>6</Position><Selectable>False</Selectable><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>140</Width></Column6><Column7 ID="NoiCap"><Caption>Nơi Cấp</Caption><DataMember>NoiCap</DataMember><Key>NoiCap</Key><Position>7</Position><Selectable>False</Selectable><Width>170</Width></Column7><Column8 ID="NgayKyHopDong"><Caption>Ngày ký hợp đồng</Caption><DataMember>NgayKyHopDong</DataMember><EditType>CalendarCombo</EditType><FormatString>dd/MM/yyyy</FormatString><InputMask>00/00/0000</InputMask><Key>NgayKyHopDong</Key><Position>8</Position><Selectable>False</Selectable><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>193</Width></Column8><Column9 ID="ParentID"><Caption>ParentID</Caption><DataMember>ParentID</DataMember><Key>ParentID</Key><Position>9</Position><Visible>False</Visible></Column9></Columns><AllowDelete>False</AllowDelete><AllowEdit>False</AllowEdit><GroupCondition
